findings.observation: One E-stop button on CNC-101A panel faded — difficult to locate in emergency
findings.action: E-stop button replaced with new high-visibility unit

findings.observation: RF warning sign at Z4 entry door partially damaged
findings.action: New sign installed with durable material

findings.observation: Aluminized jacket #3 has a tear on right sleeve — still in use rack
findings.action: Jacket removed and replaced with new one

findings.observation: DG room housekeeping poor — oil stains on floor, rags near hot exhaust
findings.action: Deep cleaning done. Daily housekeeping checklist created for Z8

findings.observation: Grinding wheel guard missing on bench grinder
findings.action: Guard procured and installed. Machine tagged out until guard fitted

findings.observation: Sling inspection log not updated for February
findings.action: Log updated. Monthly reminder set in system

findings.observation: Coolant spillage near FRM-201A — slippery floor
findings.action: Leak fixed. Anti-slip mat placed. Spill kit nearby

findings.observation: Forklift reverse alarm not working on FLT-02

title: ISO 9001:2015 Surveillance Audit

findings.observation: Process parameters for heat treatment not documented for new pipe size SP-STR-100 (100×100mm square tube)
findings.action: Process sheet created and approved. Training given to operators.

findings.observation: Calibration records for laser OD gauge not linked to production batch records for traceability
findings.action: Calibration certificate number now recorded in batch inspection report

result: Certification continued. 1 Minor NC. 1 OFI. No Major NC.

title: Half-Yearly Environmental Compliance Audit
scope: Air emissions, water discharge, waste management

findings.observation: Stack emission test for furnace fume extraction overdue by 2 weeks
findings.action: Test conducted on 2026-01-25. Results within limits (PM: 45 mg/Nm³ vs limit 100)

findings.observation: Hazardous waste (used hydraulic oil) storage area not labelled as per rules
findings.action: Labels installed as per JSPCB requirements

findings.observation: Coolant waste disposal manifest for November missing
findings.action: Manifest recovered from transporter and filed

title: Monthly Maintenance Compliance Review — May 2026
scope: PM compliance, spare parts, work order closure

findings.observation: PM compliance for May: 87% (target: 95%). 3 weekly PMs missed on CNC-101B due to production pressure.
findings.action: Rescheduled missed PMs. Discussed with Production Manager about PM priority.

findings.observation: Spare parts stock: 2 critical items below minimum (impeder rods and hydraulic filter elements)
findings.action: PO raised for replenishment. ETA: 1 week.

findings.observation: 3 work orders from April still open (documentation pending)
findings.action: Technicians instructed to close WOs within 48 hours of completion
